cases.root_cause: Insufficient cleaning after micro-etch left organic residue blocking plating at spoke junction
cases.corrective_action: Added alkaline cleaner stage and raised rinse conductivity setpoint
cases.outcome_notes: Peel strength test on spokes passed IPC criteria

cases.component_type: fine trace pair — battery sense lines
cases.root_cause: Solder bridge from excess paste deposit due to worn stencil aperture corners
cases.corrective_action: Stencil inspection every 500 prints and aperture corner re-cut
cases.outcome_notes: SPI volume readings stabilized within ±8% of nominal

cases.root_cause: Aggressive etching with oscillating pH caused lateral undercut (mouse bite) on trace sidewalls
cases.corrective_action: Stabilized etchant ORP and switched to controlled spray nozzle pattern
cases.outcome_notes: Cross-sections showed uniform trace width within ±10% of design

cases.root_cause: Incomplete etching due to photoresist scumming left isolated copper spur in clearance zone
cases.corrective_action: Added post-develop descum plasma step before etch
cases.outcome_notes: Optical inspection of clearance gaps clear on audit panels

cases.root_cause: Conductive ionic contamination from inadequate DI rinse created dendritic short under humidity
cases.corrective_action: Extended final rinse cycles and installed in-line resistivity monitoring above 10 MΩ·cm
cases.outcome_notes: HAST chamber retest passed after rinse SOP update

cases.root_cause: Mechanical nick during depanelization severed trace at panel edge
cases.corrective_action: Switched to laser depanelization and added keep-out routing near break tabs
cases.outcome_notes: AOI false opens at panel edge dropped to zero over 500 boards

cases.root_cause: Photoresist edge damage from particulate on exposure vacuum frame created notch defects
cases.corrective_action: Added frame cleaning between panels and HEPA upgrade on clean room
cases.outcome_notes: Particle count reduced; edge notch defects not seen in 200-panel run

cases.outcome_notes: AOI false opens at panel edge dropped to zero over 500 boards

cases.root_cause: Etch factor mismatch on high-current density areas at panel center
cases.corrective_action: Rebalanced cathode/anode geometry and throttled current density
cases.outcome_notes: Impedance TDR sweep within spec on RF test coupons

cases.root_cause: Misaligned second-side artwork left copper spur extending into mask opening
cases.corrective_action: Dual-sided alignment pins verified; LDI scaling compensation updated

cases.corrective_action: Stencil inspection every 500 prints and aperture corner re-cut
cases.outcome_notes: SPI volume readings stabilized within ±8% of nominal

cases.root_cause: Insufficient cleaning after micro-etch left organic residue blocking plating at spoke junction
cases.corrective_action: Added alkaline cleaner stage and raised rinse conductivity setpoint
cases.outcome_notes: Peel strength test on spokes passed IPC criteria

cases.root_cause: Conductive ionic contamination from inadequate DI rinse created dendritic short under humidity
cases.corrective_action: Extended final rinse cycles and installed in-line resistivity monitoring above 10 MΩ·cm
cases.outcome_notes: HAST chamber retest passed after rinse SOP update

cases.component_type: thermal relief spoke — motor driver pour
cases.root_cause: Insufficient cleaning after micro-etch left organic residue blocking plating at spoke junction
cases.corrective_action: Added alkaline cleaner stage and raised rinse conductivity setpoint
cases.outcome_notes: Peel strength test on spokes passed IPC criteria

cases.root_cause: Copper foil burr from routing bit deposited and pressed into laminate during layup
cases.corrective_action: Routing bit change interval halved and post-route compressed air blow-off added
cases.outcome_notes: Tooling zone AOI clean on 100 consecutive panels

cases.root_cause: Pinhole in dry film photoresist allowed electroplated copper nodule in mask-free zone
cases.corrective_action: Vacuum lamination pressure increased and film expiry tracking enforced
cases.outcome_notes: Nodule count per panel dropped from 3 avg to 0.1 avg

cases.root_cause: Solder bridge from excess paste deposit due to worn stencil aperture corners
cases.corrective_action: Stencil inspection every 500 prints and aperture corner re-cut
cases.outcome_notes: SPI volume readings stabilized within ±8% of nominal

cases.component_type: blind via capture pad — heat spreader plane
cases.root_cause: Laser drill debris not fully removed before plating seeded pinhole at capture pad center
cases.corrective_action: Ultrasonic clean after laser drill and vacuum desmear before metallization
cases.outcome_notes: Cross-section of blind vias showed continuous barrel without voids

cases.root_cause: Over-etching combined with solder mask misalignment left insufficient mask dam between pads
cases.corrective_action: Recalibrated LDI exposure dose and tightened solder mask develop time
cases.outcome_notes: Electrical test shorts between 0.4 mm pitch pads eliminated on validation lot

cases.root_cause: Laser drill debris not fully removed before plating seeded pinhole at capture pad center
cases.corrective_action: Ultrasonic clean after laser drill and vacuum desmear before metallization
cases.outcome_notes: Cross-section of blind vias showed continuous barrel without voids

cases.root_cause: Broken trace fragment from prior panel handling adhered and was laminated as foreign copper
cases.corrective_action: Enhanced pre-lamination panel wipe and ionizer bars at layup
cases.outcome_notes: Foreign material FOD checks added to layup checklist

cases.root_cause: Incomplete copper plating in via barrel due to air bubble entrapment during electroplating
cases.corrective_action: Enabled pulse plating and reduced panel rack density in plating tank
cases.outcome_notes: Cross-section microscopy on next 20 panels showed full barrel coverage

cases.root_cause: Copper foil burr from routing bit deposited and pressed into laminate during layup
cases.corrective_action: Routing bit change interval halved and post-route compressed air blow-off added
cases.outcome_notes: Tooling zone AOI clean on 100 consecutive panels

cases.component_type: ground isolation gap — antenna feed gap
cases.root_cause: Incomplete etching due to photoresist scumming left isolated copper spur in clearance zone
cases.corrective_action: Added post-develop descum plasma step before etch
cases.outcome_notes: Optical inspection of clearance gaps clear on audit panels

cases.root_cause: Photoresist edge damage from particulate on exposure vacuum frame created notch defects
cases.corrective_action: Added frame cleaning between panels and HEPA upgrade on clean room
cases.outcome_notes: Particle count reduced; edge notch defects not seen in 200-panel run

cases.root_cause: Misaligned second-side artwork left copper spur extending into mask opening
cases.corrective_action: Dual-sided alignment pins verified; LDI scaling compensation updated
cases.outcome_notes: Registration offset reduced below 25 µm on double-sided lot

cases.root_cause: Insufficient solder mask tenting over via allowed paste wicking and bridge to adjacent pad
cases.corrective_action: Filled vias with epoxy fill and planarized before mask application
cases.outcome_notes: X-ray inspection confirmed no wicking on filled vias

cases.root_cause: Copper sliver left between pour and signal trace after CAM cleanup gap
cases.corrective_action: Updated CAM DRC to enforce minimum sliver removal width of 0.15 mm
cases.outcome_notes: CAM review checklist added; no slivers on next 30 designs

cases.component_type: panel tooling hole vicinity — RF ground ring
cases.root_cause: Copper foil burr from routing bit deposited and pressed into laminate during layup
cases.corrective_action: Routing bit change interval halved and post-route compressed air blow-off added
cases.outcome_notes: Tooling zone AOI clean on 100 consecutive panels

cases.root_cause: Etch factor mismatch on high-current density areas at panel center
cases.corrective_action: Rebalanced cathode/anode geometry and throttled current density
cases.outcome_notes: Impedance TDR sweep within spec on RF test coupons

cases.root_cause: Entrapped air during panel entry into plating bath caused non-coating bubble defect
cases.corrective_action: Reduced entry angle and added cathode rod oscillation in plating tank
cases.outcome_notes: Plating thickness CV improved from 12% to 6%

cases.root_cause: Void in electroless copper seed layer created pinhole that propagated through plate
cases.corrective_action: Replenished electroless chemistry and reduced bath contamination via filtration
cases.outcome_notes: Backlight inspection of planes showed full coverage on sample set

cases.root_cause: Insufficient solder mask tenting over via allowed paste wicking and bridge to adjacent pad
cases.corrective_action: Filled vias with epoxy fill and planarized before mask application
cases.outcome_notes: X-ray inspection confirmed no wicking on filled vias
